title: linaria linaria
intro: Linaria linaria, also known as toadflax or butterfly flower, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the figwort family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Linaria linaria include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as showing potential in treating digestive issues and skin conditions. Linaria linaria is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to make the most of its medicinal properties.
